title: orthoraphium coreanum var. kengii
intro: Orthoraphium coreanum var. kengii, also known as Keng's Orthoraphis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional medicine, Keng's Orthoraphis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
